parameters.name: campaign_performance
parameters.description: Retrieves performance metrics (impressions, clicks, cost, conversions) for all campaigns over a specified date range.

value.dateRange: ={{ $fromAI('dateRange', 'Date range (e.g., LAST_7_DAYS, LAST_30_DAYS, THIS_MONTH). Defaults to LAST_30_DAYS.', 'string') }}

parameters.name: keyword_performance
parameters.description: Retrieves performance metrics for keywords, optionally filtered by campaign or ad group.

parameters.name: ad_performance
parameters.description: Retrieves performance metrics for individual ads.

parameters.name: search_terms_report
parameters.description: Retrieves actual search terms users typed to see your ads.

parameters.name: budget_pacing
parameters.description: Retrieves budget performance and usage for campaigns.

parameters.name: geographic_performance
parameters.description: Retrieves performance metrics broken down by geographic locations.

parameters.name: device_performance
parameters.description: Retrieves performance metrics broken down by device type (mobile, desktop, tablet).

parameters.name: hourly_performance
parameters.description: Retrieves performance metrics broken down by hour of day to identify best performing times.
